distinctive_elements: area-specific musical themes corresponding to historical periods
thematic representation of different worlds: Prehistoria, Antiqua, Gothica, Omnitopia

notes: T2 data tier: No detailed music documentation (tempo, keys, chord progressions, SFX characteristics) found in available sources. Wikipedia confirms composer Jeremy Soule and notes 'ambient music' as a distinctive characteristic that helped the game develop a cult following. Data Crystal and TCRF sources provide technical ROM information and development/debug details but no audio parameters. Specific area-based music analysis, tempo markings, key signatures, and sound effect characteristics are not documented in these sources.
